rules.title: Respect Everyone
rules.rule: Treat all players and staff with respect at all times.

rules.title: No Harassment
rules.rule: Harassment, hate speech, or discrimination is not allowed.

rules.title: No Random Deathmatch
rules.rule: Do not attack or kill without valid roleplay reason.

rules.title: No Metagaming
rules.rule: Do not use out-of-character information in character.
